query: ("weather forecast" OR "meteorological forecast" OR "temperature forecast" OR "heat forecast" OR "early warning system" OR "heat warning" OR "cooling center" OR "cooling centre" OR "cooling shelter" OR "heat refuge" OR "climate shelter" OR "temperature intervention" OR "heat intervention" OR "heat advisory" OR "heat alert" OR "heat action plan" OR "extreme heat plan" OR "heat preparedness" OR "thermal comfort intervention") AND ("randomized controlled trial" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment" OR "difference-in-difference" OR "instrumental variable" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "causal inference" OR "plausibly exogenous" OR "interrupted time series" OR "propensity score" OR "matching" OR "before-after" OR "pre-post" OR "controlled before-after" OR "impact evaluation" OR "policy evaluation" OR "program evaluation") AND ("temperature mortality" OR "heat mortality" OR "thermal stress" OR "heat-related death" OR "temperature morbidity" OR "heat-related illness" OR "hyperthermia" OR "heat stroke" OR "excess mortality" OR "heat wave mortality" OR "extreme heat mortality" OR "temperature-related health" OR "heat-health" OR "thermal health")
